AI LEGALNOMICS OS

Cross-module flow mapping for public demand, advocate routing, drafting, hearing and revenue progression.

SYSTEM LAYER
Legalnomics Home System Flow Global Ready

System Flow Hub

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > System Flow Hub

Lead to Matter B2C to B2B Revenue Loop

Primary Flow

  • B2C user enters through Notice / Reply / Consultation
  • Lead gets created and enters Exchange engine
  • Geo matching finds nearby advocate / firm / notary
  • Assignment routes matter to the right desk
  • CRM and Drafting Studio handle execution
  • Vault, Hearing and Billing complete the lifecycle

Commercial Flow

  • Consultation leads can convert into paid matters
  • Advocates can buy or claim qualified leads
  • Firms can route leads internally to staff
  • Notary requests create separate service monetization
  • Later subscription, API and SaaS billing can connect here
